passives.name: Ironhide
passives.description: Exhaustion locked dice are d6s instead of d4s

skills.name: Bash
skills.description: Deal dice + STR damage to a single enemy

skills.name: Blood Cleave
skills.description: Spend 5% current HP (temp HP first, floors real HP at 1). Deal dice + STR + 5 damage to all enemies.

skills.name: Bloodletting
skills.description: Track all damage taken this turn including self-inflicted up to dice + CON. Convert tracked damage to temp HP at start of next turn. New application replaces existing temp HP.
